DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC DEFAULT MANAGEMENT SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Brandon M. Love, Esq. of Pite Duncan, LLP 714/285-2636 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as moving party provided courtesy copies including a proof of service. Upon further review, the Court sustained the demurrer as to those causes of action demurred to, the 1st, 3rd, 4th, 5th & 6th, without leave to amend. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Williams, Esq. of Bledsoe, Cathcart, Diestel, Pedersen & Treppa LLP 981-5411 for defts & moving parties LITTON LOAN SERVICING, LP, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., and HSBC BANK, U.S.A., N.A., As Trustee for the Benefit of the Certificateholders of Nomura Home Equity, Inc.; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
